nodes.label: AI as creative collaborator for brainstorming and research
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I will often use AI as a sounding board, to help brainstorm ideas

nodes.label: AI as superficial editor and first-check
nodes.grounding_span: I look to it as a first-check

nodes.label: AI as generative tool for visual elements
nodes.grounding_span: I often employ generative AI imaging services and combine it with details I craft

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness for editing and design
nodes.grounding_span: I don't fully trust it to edit a work to completion

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors
nodes.label_negative: AI as complementary tool alongside human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I can understand why some feel that it's perhaps a threat to artistic endeavours

nodes.label: Creative expansion and scope
nodes.grounding_span: It's definitely helped expand my creative scope

nodes.label: Efficiency and focus on craft
nodes.grounding_span: I am more able to work on the fine-grained details

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI as creative assistant
nodes.grounding_span: AI has allowed me to consider new concepts and ways of doing things

nodes.label: Optimistic view of AI complementing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I am optimistic that human creativity will always triumph

nodes.label: Cautious trust due to current limitations
nodes.grounding_span: I don't fully trust it to edit a work to completion

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: its design work often requires a fair amount of oversight and re-tooling

nodes.label: Conceptual expansion from initial ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I've always found it easy to come up with an initial idea, but moving beyond that has been challenging
